The Vault v0.2.4 hardens Agent Review and project review operations.

Highlights:
- Fixes the Agent Review pending-delete query by using the shared capped query path.
- Reuses the same pending-delete helper from Dashboard so both surfaces behave consistently.
- Adds an on-demand project review runner with project selection and clear result messaging.
- Adds IPC/preload support for forced project review execution.
- Adds regression coverage for the Agent Review query path.

This build packages the desktop app and the bundled `vault-memory` MCP sidecar runtime. After installing, open The Vault and use Settings -> Client setup to connect Codex, Claude Desktop, or Claude Code.
